display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Solid white with at most one gradient phrase.

headline.purpose: Section titles, near-white, normal weight. Scale carries hierarchy.

label.purpose: Uppercase eyebrow badges and pills, 0.18em tracking.

mono.purpose: JetBrains Mono, code and terminal UI only.

shadows.name: soft
shadows.purpose: Default resting elevation for glass cards.

shadows.name: blue-cta
shadows.purpose: Tinted glow under the primary blue CTA.

motion.name: lift
motion.purpose: 2px hover lift on cards and interactive surfaces.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one action color. Hero CTA, downloads, primary conversions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>Download</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #2563eb; color: #fff; padding: 14px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px -10px rgba(30,58,138,0.4); transition: background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3b82f6; box-shadow: 0 12px 36px -10px rgba(30,58,138,0.6); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #60a5fa; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action paired with the primary CTA. Glass on dark.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"/></svg>See it in action</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: rgba(15,23,42,0.6); color: #f1f5f9; padding: 14px 24px; border: 1px solid #334155; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #64748b; background: rgba(30,41,59,0.6); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #60a5fa; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Eyebrow Badge
components.description: Uppercase status pill with a pulsing dot. Used above hero headlines.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.3); background: rgba(59,130,246,0.1); border-radius: 9999px; color: #93c5fd; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #60a5fa; } .ds-badge-sep { color: rgba(59,130,246,0.6); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Translucent slate pane suspended in lit haze. The default container.
components.html:
Every model, your keys

Call any provider with your own API keys. No credits, no markup, no curated roster.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(15,23,42,0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(30,41,59,0.6); box-shadow: 0 20px 60px -28px rgba(2,6,23,0.7), 0 8px 24px -10px rgba(120,53,15,0.35), inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.2,0.8,0.2,1), border-color 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(59,130,246,0.5); box-shadow: 0 30px 90px -32px rgba(2,6,23,0.8), 0 16px 40px -16px rgba(120,53,15,0.45); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px; color: #fff; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; color: #94a3b8; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.55; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Top-nav link, secondary text warming to action blue on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { color: #e2e8f0; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #3b82f6; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #60a5fa; outline-offset: 4px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Glow-Backed Hero Media
components.description: Signature pattern: product screenshot in a glass frame over a multi-stop radial glow.
components.css: .ds-hero-media { position: relative; padding: 24px; } .ds-hero-glow { position: absolute; inset: -24px; z-index: 0; border-radius: 32px; filter: blur(48px); opacity: 0.7; background: radial-gradient(60% 60% at 50% 0%, rgba(168,85,247,0.35), transparent 60%), radial-gradient(50% 60% at 100% 100%, rgba(244,114,182,0.25), transparent 60%), radial-gradient(50% 60% at 0% 100%, rgba(59,130,246,0.25), transparent 60%); } .ds-hero-frame { position: relative; z-index: 1; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(51,65,85,0.6); background: rgba(15,23,42,0.8); box-shadow: 0 30px 90px -32px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding: 6px; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .ds-hero-shot { aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a, #020617); }

narrative.overview: A dark professional studio where the work is the only thing lit. The canvas is near-black slate; product screenshots, nodes, and headlines float in pools of colored light: blue, fuchsia, and amber glows blooming softly behind the surfaces. The mood is focused and after-hours. Color is atmosphere, not chrome. Surfaces are translucent slate glass with hairline borders and a faint white ring, lifted off the canvas rather than flat boxes. Type is Inter, large and confident for headlines, quiet and readable for body; JetBrains Mono appears only where code is literally shown. It rejects generic SaaS, enterprise stiffness, and crypto hype. Dark because the work glows best in the dark, not because dark looks edgy.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black slate canvas with atmospheric colored glows (blue / fuchsia / amber)
Translucent glass surfaces: backdrop-blur, hairline borders, faint white ring
Blue as the action color; fuchsia and rose as creative energy; amber as warmth
Inter throughout, JetBrains Mono only for real code
Soft, exponential motion: fly-in reveals and 2px hover lifts, never bounce

rules.name: The Light-Has-A-Source Rule
rules.body: Color appears as glow or as a single solid action color, never as decorative gradient fills on content blocks. If a color is on screen, it is either lighting something or marking an action.

rules.name: The Legacy Amber Rule
rules.body: The old amber-and-teal system (--text-link #f59e0b, gradient-clip headings, amber wordmark) is deprecated. New work uses Action Blue for links and solid near-white for headings.

rules.name: The One-Gradient-Span Rule
rules.body: A headline gets at most one gradient-colored phrase, and only on the hero. Everywhere else headings are solid white. Hierarchy comes from size and weight, never from coloring whole headings.

rules.name: The Lit-Haze Rule
rules.body: Elevation is glow + soft tinted shadow + blur, together. Never a single crisp dark drop-shadow. If a surface looks like a 2014 Material card, widen the blur, tint the shadow, add the glow behind it.

dos: Do keep the canvas near-black slate (#020617) and let colored glows do the lighting.
Do use Action Blue (#2563eb) as the one action color: CTAs, focused borders, active nav, links.
Do build surfaces as glass: slate-900/60 + hairline border + ring-white/5 + backdrop-blur.
Do elevate with the Lit-Haze recipe: wide soft tinted shadow + glow + blur, together.
Do restrict gradients to one phrase on the hero headline and to atmospheric glows.
Do keep visible 2px focus rings on every interactive element; the dark ground demands it.
Do hold body copy to 65-75ch and verify Muted Text (#94a3b8) hits WCAG AA on its actual surface; lift to slate-300 (#cbd5e1) wherever it doesn't.
donts: Don't revive the legacy amber-and-teal system: no --text-link #f59e0b, no gradient-clip headings, no amber wordmark. Gradient-clipped heading text is banned outright.
Don't use the shadcn ui/Button (pink->cyan) or ui/Card (white) defaults; they are stale and off-system.
Don't ship a generic SaaS landing: no cream backgrounds, no identical icon-heading-text card grids, no big-number hero-metric template.
Don't drift enterprise: no navy-and-gray corporate flatness, no stock photography, no jargon.
Don't go crypto-hype: no neon-on-black, no gradient overload, no breathless revolutionary copy.
Don't use a single crisp dark drop-shadow (the 2014-Material look); widen and tint it.
Don't add side-stripe borders (border-left/border-right >1px as a colored accent).
